allow: Bash(node -e "const { Sequelize } = require\('sequelize'\); const path = require\('path'\); const dbPath = path.join\(__dirname, '..', 'database.sqlite'\); const seq = new Sequelize\({ dialect: 'sqlite', storage: dbPath, logging: false }\); seq.query\('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\"'\).then\(\([rows]\) => { rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\); seq.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Sequelize } = require\('sequelize'\); const path = require\('path'\); const dbPath = path.join\(__dirname, '..', 'database.sqlite'\); const seq = new Sequelize\({ dialect: 'sqlite', storage: dbPath, logging: false }\); seq.query\('SELECT id, name, apellido1, email FROM Clients ORDER BY id'\).then\(\([rows]\) => { rows.forEach\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\); seq.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")
